name: Mailhouse Media - Route Space Order Webhook

parameters.query: =SELECT r.route_number, r.zip_code, c.name as city, c.state_code FROM routes r JOIN cities c ON r.city_id = c.id WHERE r.id = '{{ $json.route_id }}'

meta.description: Handles route-specific ad space orders from the landing page. Validates input, reserves specific space in specific route, generates payment link.
